refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall analyze the worksite area to identify terrain features, obstacles, and represent the work-zone accurately.
refined_fr.rationale: Decomposing the broad requirement into specific analysis tasks ensures clarity and targeted verification for terrain, obstacles, and work-zone representation.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by generating a digital worksite model/map that includes terrain elevation data, obstacle locations, and delineated work-zone boundaries, validated against ground truth or site survey data.
sub_frs: FR1: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and characterize obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Represent the work-zone boundaries and relevant site features.

candidate_dps: DP1: Terrain analysis algorithm using elevation and sensor data fusion.
DP2: Obstacle detection and classification module using LIDAR and camera inputs.
DP3: Work-zone mapping and feature representation using GIS-based modeling.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1, DP2, and DP3 combined to fulfill the sub-FRs for comprehensive worksite mapping.

potential_sources: Data dependencies between terrain and obstacle analysis modules.
Integration of mapping outputs for unified work-zone representation.
coupling_check.notes: The selected DPs are logically coupled but modular, allowing clear interfaces and manageable integration.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate sensor data (LIDAR, cameras, GPS).
Risk of data latency or inconsistency affecting real-time mapping accuracy.
High safety criticality demands robust fault detection and recovery.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider explicit fault tolerance DP or redundancy in sensor data processing to mitigate safety risks.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Centralized processing and integration of terrain, obstacle, and work-zone mapping functions.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data (LIDAR, cameras, GPS) for analysis.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Provides processed worksite model/map data to planning and execution modules.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data exchange with remote monitoring and control systems.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment of mapping functions with minimal diffusion; centralized ownership supports safety and integration.
Limited containment; vehicle sensors provide raw data but do not perform mapping.
No containment; teleoperation consumes mapping data but does not generate it.
Minimal containment; safety services may consume alerts but do not perform mapping.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing the worksite mapping functions within the NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports high safety criticality by enabling integrated fault management.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck or single point of failure in NGHE Solution module.
Integration complexity with sensor data sources and downstream consumers.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Evaluate modular redundancy or failover strategies within NGHE Solution to mitigate risks.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The refined FRs are well matched by selected DPs with clear logical mapping and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Centralized DP implementation in NGHE Solution may increase diffusion risk if not properly modularized internally.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores favor NGHE Solution as the best architectural boundary for these DPs.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by testing the integrated NGHE Solution module outputs against site survey data and sensor inputs.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of mapping functions to NGHE Solution module with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Add fault tolerance DP and corresponding IM considerations.
Plan for modular internal architecture within NGHE Solution to reduce diffusion risk.

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition and allocation meets the requirements with acceptable risk and clear architectural boundaries. No immediate need to zigzag or revise at this stage.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and characterize obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Represent the work-zone boundaries and relevant site features.

revise.why: In future levels, incorporate fault tolerance and redundancy to address safety criticality.

assumptions: Centralized processing within NGHE Solution is feasible and maintainable.
open_risks: Single point of failure in NGHE Solution module.
Data latency impacting real-time mapping accuracy.
evidence_needed: Performance and fault tolerance test results of NGHE Solution mapping functions.
Validation of sensor data integration and processing latency.
